2605.22511.title: Search-E1: Self-Distillation Drives Self-Evolution in Search-Augmented Reasoning
2605.22511.paper_summary: Post-training has become the dominant recipe for turning a language model into a competent search-augmented reasoning agent. A line of recent work pushes its performance further by adding elaborate machinery on top of this standard pipeline. These augmentations import external supervision from stronger external systems, attach auxiliary modules such as process reward models or retrospective critics, restructure the rollout itself with tree search or multi-stage curricula, or shape the reward with hand-crafted bonuses and penalties. Each addition delivers a measurable gain, but each also inflates the training pipeline and ties the recipe to resources or designs that may not always be available. We take a step back and ask whether any of this machinery is actually necessary, and propose Search-E1, a self-evolution method that lets a search-augmented agent improve through only vanilla GRPO interleaved with offline self-distillation (OFSD). After each GRPO round, the policy rolls out on its own training questions. A token-level forward KL objective then aligns the policy's inference-time distribution to its own distribution under a privileged context that exposes a more efficient sibling trajectory. Despite this simplicity, the procedure naturally provides dense per-step supervision. On seven QA benchmarks, Search-E1 reaches $0.440$ average EM with Qwen2.5-3B, surpassing all open-source baselines at both scales. Code and complete version will be made public soon.
2605.22511.paper_summary_zh: 後訓練已成為將語言模型轉變為有能力的搜索增強推理代理的主流方法。最近的一系列研究通過在這一標準流程之上添加精密的機制，進一步提升了其性能。這些增強引入來自更強外部系統的外部監督，附加輔助模塊，例如過程獎勵模型或回顧批評者，通過樹搜索或多階段課程重構推理過程本身，或通過手工製作的獎金和懲罰來塑造獎勵。每一項新增都帶來可測量的增益，但每一項也都膨脹了訓練流程，並將這一方法與可能並不總是可用的資源或設計緊密相連。我們退後一步，詢問這些機制是否實際上是必要的，並提出Search-E1，一種自我演化方法，讓搜索增強代理僅通過普通的GRPO與離線自我蒸餾（OFSD）交錯進行改進。在每一輪GRPO之後，策略在其自己的訓練問題上進行推理。然後，一個基於標記級別的前向KL目標使策略的推理時間分佈與其在特權上下文下的自身分佈對齊，該上下文暴露出一條更高效的兄弟軌跡。儘管這種簡單性，該程序自然提供了每一步的密集監督。在七個QA基準上，Search-E1達到了$0.440$的平均EM，使用Qwen2.5-3B，超過了所有開源基準。代碼和完整版本將很快公開。
2605.22511.author: Zihan Liang et.al.
2605.22511.authors: Zihan Liang, Yufei Ma, Ben Chen, Zhipeng Qian, Xuxin Zhang, Huangyu Dai, Lingtao Mao
